sentences.arabic: كَانَتْ لَيْلَةُ الْعِيدِ لَيْلَةً مُبَهِجَةً فِي الْحَيِّ.
sentences.translation: Noć uoči praznika bila je radosna noć u kvartu.
sentences.translationEn: The eve of the holiday was a joyful night in the neighborhood.

sentences.arabic: خَرَجَ الأَطْفَالُ بِمَلَابِسَ جَدِيدَةٍ وَوُجُوهٍ مُبْتَسِمَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Djeca su izašla u novoj odjeći i s nasmiješenim licima.
sentences.translationEn: Children went out in new clothes and with smiling faces.

sentences.translation: Komšije su razmjenjivali čestitke i slatkiše.

sentences.arabic: بَقِيَ الْجَمِيعُ فِي الشَّارِعِ حَتَّى وَقْتٍ مُتَأَخِّرٍ مِنَ اللَّيْلِ.
sentences.translation: Svi su ostali na ulici do kasno u noć.
sentences.translationEn: Everyone stayed in the street until late at night.
